Hello! Welcome to Canada. I'm Roots, your AI companion. I'm here to help newcomers like you with any questions about settling in, from immigration and housing to jobs and healthcare.

How can I assist you today?

Type *STATUS* to check your application timeline or *PROXY* to connect with others who made your move.
I can't make outbound calls right now, but you can call me directly at +1 (572) 900 6236! Just use your phone to call me and we can talk 📞
